subject: Set the docker version for CLI to beijing
commit_message:
Set the docker version for CLI to beijing

Issue-ID: CLI-106

Change-Id: I07bf7d3592e47507b179a35f89574cbf11f70eea
Signed-off-by: Kanagaraj Manickam k00365106 <kanagaraj.manickam@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o=wide | grep cli
onap          dev-cli-5df885d9db-kjhjz                    0/1       CrashLoopBackOff   6          7m          10.42.205.120   oom-k8s-1

kubectl -n onap describe pod dev-cli-5df885d9db-kjhjz  
  Normal   Scheduled              4m                       default-scheduler   Successfully assigned dev-cli-5df885d9db-kjhjz to oom-k8s-1
  Normal   SuccessfulMountVolume  3m                       kubelet, oom-k8s-1  MountVolume.SetUp succeeded for volume "default-token-nrr2k"
  Warning  Unhealthy              2m                       kubelet, oom-k8s-1  Liveness probe failed: dial tcp 10.42.205.120:80: getsockopt: connection refused
  Normal   Created                2m (x4 over 3m)          kubelet, oom-k8s-1  Created container
  Normal   Started                2m (x4 over 3m)          kubelet, oom-k8s-1  Started container
  Warning  FailedSync             1m (x5 over 2m)          kubelet, oom-k8s-1  Error syncing pod
  Normal   Pulled                 1m (x5 over 3m)          kubelet, oom-k8s-1  Container image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/cli:2.0-STAGING-latest" already present on machine
  Warning  BackOff                <invalid> (x21 over 2m)  kubelet, oom-k8s-1  Back-off restarting failed container


kubectl -n onap logs -f dev-cli-5df885d9db-kjhjz
CLI version       : 2.0.0 [20180418T123534Z]
Available products: [open-cli, onap-beijing, onap-amsterdam, sample-helloworld]
Enabled product   : open-cli

To enable a product, use one of following methods:
1. In scripting mode, set environment variable OPEN_CLI_PRODUCT_IN_USE
2. In interactive mode, use the directive 'use <product>'

Patch Set 1:

Mike, is this change not required ? I would like to use the latest cli docker image.
Uploaded patch set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased.

Patch Set 2: Verified-1

Unfortunately the container is not coming up. A look at the logs seems to indicate that there might be configuration changes that need to go with the image change.

onap          dev-cli-75db74cbc6-q29m8               0/1       CrashLoopBackOff   6          7m        10.42.201.55    sb6-k8s-1


kubectl -n onap logs -f dev-cli-75db74cbc6-q29m8

CLI version       : 2.0.0 [20180430T123253Z]
Available products: [open-cli, onap-beijing, onap-amsterdam, sample-helloworld]
Enabled product   : open-cli

To enable a product, use one of following methods:
1. In scripting mode, set environment variable OPEN_CLI_PRODUCT_IN_USE
2. In interactive mode, use the directive 'use <product>'

Patch Set 2:

Hi Mike, I have fixed this now and update the changes.
Uploaded patch set 3: Patch Set 2 was rebased.
Patch Set 4: Patch Set 3 was rebased
Patch Set 5: Patch Set 4 was rebased
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda
